title: Forbidden Audit-Paint Property Names
description: Shared JSON Schema Draft 7 constraint that rejects audit-paint property names — fields whose names imply 'we documented this violation, so it is compliant.' Per RULE-CI-DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE-NOT-COMPLIANCE-1: audit/paper-trail fields recording a policy violation MUST NOT transform the violation into a state of compliance. This constraint makes the construct unrepresentable: any schema that references this definition via allOf will reject instances containing forbidden field names. Forbidden names include: override, documented_exception, truth_delivered_override, audit_override, policy_override, exception_override, and any compound forms ending in _audit_override or _override_documented.
